headline: Roche Group announces immediate termination of its global neuro-degenerative and Central Nervous System (CNS) research pipeline.
summary: Roche Holding AG has announced an immediate corporate pivot toward oncology, completely shutting down its ongoing clinical research for Parkinson's and Alzheimer's treatments globally.
